summary: Excellent soundboard mix captures a powerful show highlighted by an incredible “Jack Straw” performance.
review: Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard recording and thank the mixers for their work, calling the mix “incredible.” The only specific musical highlight mentioned is a superb rendition of “Jack Straw,” indicating a strong performance despite limited detail on the rest of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise both the mix quality and the show, while a third review (rating entered as 0) still compliments the sound mix. With three reviews total, confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners repeatedly thank the mixers and describe the mix as “incredible” and “powerful,” indicating a clear, well‑balanced soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; only a single song is highlighted positively.
